articles.title: OpenAI Launches GPT-5.6 Series in US-Only Preview At Government's Request
articles.description: OpenAI said in a blog post that the limited release was a temporary step.

articles.title: Centre plans Rs 12,000 crore incentive scheme to spur private electric bus adoption
articles.description: The government is planning a significant incentive package, potentially worth ₹12,000 crore, to boost electric bus adoption by private fleet operators. This scheme could include interest subvention, credit guarantees, and capital subsidies, aiming to encourage the deployment of 50,000 electric buses over a decade. Officials anticipate this will unlock substantial private investment, mirroring successful government initiatives for public transport.

articles.title: Qualcomm Reportedly Eyes Data-Center Chip Tech For Smartphones And Cars — But QCOM Stock Slips
articles.description: Qualcomm is looking to extend its next-generation architecture beyond servers as it expands its AI hardware ambitions across multiple devices.

articles.title: Is your phone charger wasting electricity when it's not charging?
articles.description: Homes with many phone chargers pay more even when they're not using them.

articles.title: OLED, touchscreen, and more: What to expect from the 2027 MacBook PRo
articles.description: Apple's MacBook Pro is set to receive an overhaul, with a redesign, an an OLED touchscreen expected to be the key changes. Here's what the rumor mill has to say about the device. The MacBook Pro is expected to receive an OLED panel in 2027 or 2026. While AppleInsider readers have wanted a Mac with an OLED screen for years, actual claims of an OLED-equipped MacBook Pro date back to at least 2019. As for when such an upgrade might arrive, it depends on who you ask. Leakers and analysts alike have had a lot to say about the future of the MacBook Pro, with claims of hardware changes, performance upgrades, and more. Some have even claimed Apple's touchscreen laptop will be called the MacBook Ultra. Continue Reading on AppleInsider | Discuss on our Forums

articles.title: Nothing to bring all-new Phone 4(b) series in India early next month
articles.description: Nothing Inc. gears up to launch the Phone 4(b) series in India on July 7 with a Snapdragon 6 Gen 4 chipset, 6.7-inch 1.5K AMOLED display, and 50MP dual cameras. Here’s what we know so far about the mid-range Android handset.

articles.title: India and Switzerland step up innovation partnership with focus on startups, research
articles.description: India and Switzerland are boosting science and technology ties, combining India's scale with Swiss innovation for citizen solutions and startups. Swissnex is a key facilitator, connecting innovators and supporting market entry. Switzerland is keen on India's digital infrastructure, hinting at joint ventures. New initiatives are expected soon, building on existing research programs in geoscience, healthcare, and drug development, alongside startup exchange programs.

articles.title: Netflix now requires every user profile to be tied to unique email address
articles.description: Update began June 15 and will no longer allow you to share your login info.

articles.title: HomeKit Weekly: SwitchBot Weather Station brings an E-ink calendar and climate dashboard to Apple Home
articles.description: To me, e-ink is one of the most underappreciated technologies in the world today. I love my Kindle Paperwhite. I really wish Apple made e-ink devices. However, SwitchBot has officially entered this market with the new SwitchBot Weather Station. It combines an E-ink screen, iCloud calendar syncing, and Matter-compatible environmental sensors into a single device.

Whether you are tracking the biggest industry headlines, looking for honest reviews on the latest gadgets and automobiles, or exploring the future of artificial intelligence, we have you covered. We are breaking down complex tech and answering all your burning questions, so you don't have to. In episode 8, we review the HP EliteBook X G2a AI Laptop, tell you all you need to know about a unique G-Shock watch made in collaboration with Coca-Cola, tell you all the details for the newly launched Redmi Turbo 5 and let Business Today's very own AI Anchor, Sana, tell you about the biggest tech launches and news of the week. Follow and subscribe to Business Today for more!

articles.title: Much of India’s technology stack is built on technologies developed elsewhere
articles.description: Beneath India's technology success story lies an uncomfortable reality. The country still runs much of its digital future on a borrowed stack. Can it control technologies that underpin the digital economy?

articles.title: 9to5Mac Overtime 070: The Siri Redemption Tour
articles.description: Is Siri really good this time? Fernando and Jeff talk about some of their favorite iOS 27 beta features, along with a deep dive into the key new Siri AI features, changes, updates, and optimizations. 9to5Mac Overtime is a weekly video-first podcast exploring fun and interesting observations in the Apple ecosystem, featuring 9to5Mac’s Fernando Silva & Jeff Benjamin. Subscribe to Overtime via Apple Podcasts and our YouTube channel for more.

articles.title: After 5-year hot run, luxe car sales may slow down
articles.description: India's luxury car market is experiencing its first slowdown in over five years, with sales stalling in early 2026. Heightened global uncertainties, volatile markets, and a weaker rupee are making affluent buyers cautious. Luxury carmakers have also increased prices, further impacting demand. This contrasts sharply with the booming mass-market segment, highlighting a shift in buyer sentiment among the wealthy.

articles.title: Flex on Big Savings: This Bose Portable Speaker Deal Is Under $100 Right Now
articles.description: Bose's latest-generation, floating SoundLink Flex II brings premium acoustics and bleeding-edge wireless tech to your next party, at almost 40% off during Walmart's big season sale.

articles.title: How India plans to connect with the world via India, bypassing foreign hubs; Air India makes a start with Varanasi and Delhi
articles.description: India is launching a new hub-and-spoke model to allow seamless international travel from domestic airports, bypassing foreign transit points. This initiative aims to keep Indian travelers on Indian carriers, like Air India, IndiGo, and Akasa, by connecting them through Indian hubs. Air India has already begun 'easy connect' flights from Varanasi, with plans to expand to ten more cities, significantly enhancing convenience for millions of Indian globetrotters and the diaspora.

articles.title: Bescom receives 6,500 applications for permanent electricity connection without OC
articles.description: As the Energy Department opens the window for house owners to get permanent electricity connections without applying for an Occupancy Certificate, the Bangalore Electricity Supply Company Limited (Bescom) has received 6,500 applications from Tuesday, June 23, to Friday, June 26.

The company reportedly plans to skip the launch of the M6 Pro and M6 Max processors, which were expected to launch early next year. Instead, the iPhone maker is expected to unveil the rumoured M7 Pro and M7 Max chips. Apple’s high-end M7 series processors...

If you're planning to upgrade, the question is whether to buy before prices potentially rise or wait for the next generation with better features.

articles.description: The Trump Mobile T1 Phone has been on pre-order since last year, and now it seems like it may have finally become available to purchase from the company's website, since the pre-order notice has been removed. The device will set you back $499, which is labeled as a "promotional price", funnily enough. The handset is a rebranded HTC U24 Pro with minor modifications, or rather, most likely, both HTC and Trump Mobile are using the same ODM which offers this specific model. Anyway, the Trump Mobile T1 has a 6.78-inch AMOLED screen with a 120Hz refresh rate, the Snapdragon 7 Gen 3...
